scripts.db:generate: sh -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL npx prisma generate'
scripts.db:push: sh -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL npx prisma db push'
scripts.db:sync: sh -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && DATABASE_URL=$DIRECT_URL npx prisma generate && DATABASE_URL=$DIRECT_URL npx prisma db push'
scripts.db:remove-archived:dry: sh -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL node scripts/remove-archived-proposals.mjs --dry-run'
scripts.db:remove-archived: sh -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL node scripts/remove-archived-proposals.mjs'
scripts.db:remove-bad-titles:dry: sh -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && DIRECT_URL=$DIRECT_URL node scripts/remove-bad-title-proposals.mjs --dry-run'
scripts.db:remove-bad-titles: sh -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && DIRECT_URL=$DIRECT_URL node scripts/remove-bad-title-proposals.mjs'
scripts.db:drop-snapshot: sh -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL npx prisma db execute --file scripts/drop-snapshot-table.sql'
